scripts.check: npm run check:gateway && npm run check:gateway:ts && npm run check:runtime
scripts.check:gateway: python3 -m py_compile gateway/grobot_cli.py gateway/evals/__init__.py gateway/evals/models.py gateway/evals/scoring.py gateway/evals/runner.py gateway/evals/trace_mining.py gateway/evals/trace_clean.py gateway/evals/trace_pipeline.py gateway/evals/policy_guard.py gateway/evals/skill_router_policy_guard.py gateway/evals/ci_label_policy_guard.py gateway/evals/hill_climb.py gateway/evals/skill_router_eval.py gateway/evals/skill_router_baseline_report.py gateway/evals/skill_router_ci_gate.py gateway/evals/skill_router_trend_meta.py gateway/evals/ci_summary.py gateway/evals/ci_summary_export.py gateway/tests/test_management_policy_templates.py gateway/tests/test_local_tools.py gateway/tests/test_runtime_paths.py gateway/tests/test_session_lifecycle.py gateway/tests/test_start_tool_smoke.py gateway/tests/test_ts_rust_execution.py gateway/tests/test_failover_context.py gateway/tests/test_session_store_fallback.py gateway/tests/test_history_compaction.py gateway/tests/test_handoff.py gateway/tests/test_agent_harness.py gateway/tests/test_trace_mining.py gateway/tests/test_trace_clean.py gateway/tests/test_trace_pipeline.py gateway/tests/test_trace_pipeline_policy_guard.py gateway/tests/test_skill_router_policy_guard.py gateway/tests/test_ci_label_policy_guard.py gateway/tests/test_hill_climb.py gateway/tests/test_skill_router_eval.py gateway/tests/test_skill_router_baseline_report.py gateway/tests/test_skill_router_ci_gate.py gateway/tests/test_skill_router_trend_meta.py gateway/tests/test_ci_summary.py gateway/tests/test_ci_summary_export.py gateway/tests/test_harness_gate_workflow.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_management_policy_templates.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_local_tools.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_runtime_paths.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_session_lifecycle.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_start_tool_smoke.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_ts_rust_execution.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_failover_context.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_session_store_fallback.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_history_compaction.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_handoff.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_agent_harness.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_trace_mining.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_trace_clean.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_trace_pipeline.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_trace_pipeline_policy_guard.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_skill_router_policy_guard.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_ci_label_policy_guard.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_hill_climb.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_skill_router_eval.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_skill_router_baseline_report.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_skill_router_ci_gate.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_skill_router_trend_meta.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_ci_summary.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_ci_summary_export.py && python3 gateway/tests/test_harness_gate_workflow.py
scripts.check:runtime: cargo check --manifest-path runtime/Cargo.toml && cargo test --manifest-path runtime/Cargo.toml
scripts.harness:hill-climb:sample: python3 gateway/evals/hill_climb.py --cases gateway/evals/fixtures/cases.sample.jsonl --runs gateway/evals/fixtures/runs.sample.jsonl --gate-policy gateway/evals/gate_policy.default.json --baseline-variant lexical --min-optimization-gain 0.0 --allow-holdout-drop 0.0
scripts.harness:skill-router:policy:validate: python3 gateway/evals/skill_router_eval.py --policy gateway/evals/skill_router_policy.dev.json --dry-validate-only --print-json && python3 gateway/evals/skill_router_eval.py --policy gateway/evals/skill_router_policy.ci.json --dry-validate-only --print-json && python3 gateway/evals/skill_router_eval.py --policy gateway/evals/skill_router_policy.prod.json --dry-validate-only --print-json
